description: The provided image pixels display a publisher user-interface element labeled Check for updates containing a bookmark icon and colored circular graphics, which contains no discernible scientific data, micrographs, spectra, or plots. Consequently, all material-specific visual information such as phase distributions, microstructural morphologies, diffraction peaks, or mechanical curves is completely unreadable from the figure itself. Based on the broader paper context, the research concerns bi-directional ferrite-austenite transformation in an Fe-11.15Mn-5.6Al-0.07C low-density steel during warm compression at 500 °C and 600 °C under a strain rate of 0.001 s-1, employing EBSD phase mapping, TEM bright-field imaging and selected-area electron diffraction, SEM-EDS compositional analysis, and true-stress-strain measurements. However, because the current image lacks any visible axes, legends, scale bars, sample identifiers, or experimental data panels, the exact role of this specific figure-whether it represents a micrograph, a diffraction pattern, a spectroscopy plot, or a mechanical curve-cannot be visually confirmed, and the detailed findings reported in the text (including deformation bands, dislocation cells, and phase partitioning) are not directly observable here.
